entry_rule: SELL credit call spread near mid on pullup day (trend down).
exit_rule: TP: buy back at 50% max profit (spread≈0.39); SL: buy back if spread≥1.56 OR close>EMA21 (≈29.16); Time-stop: exit by 21 days.

entry_rule: BUY debit call spread near mid on pullback day (trend up).
